text:
68. In the result, Civil Appeal Nos. 3595-3612 of 1999, Civil Appeal No. 3849 of 2001, Civil Appeal Nos. 3520-3524 of 2002 and Civil appeal arising out of Special Leave Petition (Civil) Nos. 9103-9105 of 2001 are allowed subject to the direction issued u/art. 142 of the Constitution and the general directions contained in the judgment and Civil Appeal Nos. 1861-2063 of 2001 are dismissed. There will be no order as to costs.
Appeal dismissed.
